hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. kamfani ne na fasaha na duniya wanda ke da hedikwata a Sarajevo, yana ba da mafita na software na zamani ga kamfanoni a nahiyoyi uku.

mission.title: Manufa
mission.description: Muna taimaka wa ƙungiyoyi su juya ra'ayoyi masu ban sha'awa zuwa samfuran dijital masu aminci waɗanda ke ƙirƙirar ƙimar kasuwanci mai aunawa.
points: Daidaita isar da fasaha tare da bayyananniyar sakamakon kasuwanci.
Gina tsarin dogon lokaci wanda ya ci gaba da kasancewa mai kiyaye yayin da ƙungiyoyi ke haɓakawa.
Haɗin gwiwa tare da masu ruwa da tsaki daga dabarun ta hanyar aiwatarwa.

expertise.title: Kwarewa
expertise.description: Ƙungiyoyinmu masu ƙwarewa sun haɗu da zurfin injiniya tare da tunanin samfura a duk faɗin fasahar zamani.
points: Kasuwancin yanar gizo da injiniyan dandamali.
Gine-ginen girgije, sarrafa kansa na DevOps, da kayan more rayuwa masu ƙarfi.
Aikace-aikacen AI / ML, ayyukan bayanai, da samfuran da aka ba da damar IoT.

approach.title: Hanyar da ta dace
approach.description: Muna aiwatarwa tare da bayyananne, samfurin iterative wanda ke kiyaye isar da kayayyaki yayin rage haɗarin samfurin.
points: Ganowa: ayyana iyakar, fifiko, da ma'aunin nasara da wuri.
Gina: jigilar kaya a cikin mayar da hankali increments tare da ci gaba da feedback madauki.
Ingantawa: saka idanu kan sakamako da haɓaka aiki akan lokaci.

cta.title: Shirye don canza kasuwancin ku?
cta.description: Shiga cikin jerin kamfanonin da suka amince da Horizon Tech don isar da sabbin mafita da sakamako na musamman.

hero.title: Tuntuɓi Mu
hero.description: Shin kuna da wani shiri a zuciya? Za mu so mu ji daga gare ku. Bari mu tattauna yadda za mu iya taimakawa wajen kawo ra'ayoyinku zuwa rayuwa.

booking.title: Littafin taro
booking.description: Shirya kiran ganowa na minti 30 kyauta

email.title: Imel
email.description: Aika mana imel a kowane lokaci

form.title: Aika mana saƙo
form.success: Na gode da sakonku. Za mu dawo gare ku a cikin awanni 24-48.
form.error: Wani abu ya faru ba daidai ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa ko imel da mu kai tsaye.
form.subject: Batun *

placeholders.name: Sunanka
placeholders.subject: Me za mu iya taimakawa?
placeholders.message: Faɗa mana game da aikinku ko bincikenku.

validation.email: Don Allah shigar da adireshin imel mai inganci.
validation.messageMinLength: Saƙon dole ne ya kasance aƙalla haruffa {{count}} tsawo.

contact.reasonsTitle: Me yasa kuke aiki tare da mu?
reasons: AI / ML da ƙwararrun gine-ginen girgije
Ci gaban Agile tare da sadarwa mai kyau
Tallafi na dogon lokaci da kiyayewa

custom.title: Mafita na al'ada
custom.description: Neman mafita ta musamman? Muna aiki tare da abokan ciniki don fahimtar buƙatu na musamman da isar da software na al'ada wanda ke haifar da sakamako mai aunawa.

faq.title: Kuna da ƙarin tambayoyi?
faq.description: Duba sashin FAQ ɗinmu don amsoshi masu sauri

hero.description: Ƙungiya daban-daban ta masana fasaha, masu zane-zane, da masu dabaru suna gina samfuran dijital masu tasiri tare.

section.title: Ƙungiyar Jagoranci
section.description: Shugabannin da ke jagorantar hangen nesa da haɓaka Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Jagora mai hangen nesa da gine-ginen fasaha tare da shekaru 10 + a cikin software na kasuwanci, ƙwarewa a cikin AI / ML, dandamali na girgije, da gine-ginen samfur mai haɓakawa.

ahmet.bio: Masanin tsaro na tsaro ya mai da hankali kan gine-ginen tsaro na kasuwanci, amintaccen kayan more rayuwa, da isar da biyayya na farko don yanayin da aka tsara.

culture.title: Rayuwa a Horizon Tech
culture.description: Muna haɓaka al'adun kirkire-kirkire, haɗin gwiwa, da ci gaba da ilmantarwa

remoteFirst.title: Al'adun Farko na Nesa
remoteFirst.description: Yi aiki daga ko'ina tare da sa'o'i masu sassauƙa da mai da hankali kan sakamako, ba wuri ba.

collaborative.title: Yanayin haɗin gwiwa
collaborative.description: Abubuwan da suka faru na ƙungiya na yau da kullun, zaman musayar ilimi, da haɗin gwiwar giciye.

workLife.title: Work-Life Balance
workLife.description: Manufofin hutu masu karimci, goyon bayan lafiyar hankali, da girmama lokacin sirri.

innovation.title: Innovation Time
innovation.description: 20% lokaci don ayyukan sirri, hackathons, da bincika sabbin fasahohi.

cta.title: Kuna son shiga cikin ƙungiyarmu?
cta.description: Kullum muna neman mutane masu basira waɗanda ke kula da fasaha, mallaka, da kirkire-kirkire.

hero.description: Shiga cikin ƙungiyar injiniyoyi da ke gina software na zamani don abokan ciniki na duniya. Yi aiki daga nesa, girma koyaushe, kuma yi tasiri na gaske.

process.title: Tsarin daukar ma'aikatanmu
process.description: Inganci, ingantacce, da girmamawa ga lokacinku.

steps.title: Aikace-aikace
steps.description: Gabatar da aikace-aikacen ku kuma za mu sake duba shi a cikin kwanakin kasuwanci 3.

steps.title: Tattaunawa ta farko
steps.description: Kiran bidiyo na minti 30 don tattauna kwarewarku da abubuwan da kuke tsammani.

steps.title: Fasaha
steps.description: Tattaunawa ta fasaha ko motsa jiki don nuna ƙwarewar ku.

steps.title: Tayin
steps.description: Haɗu da ƙungiyar ku kuma karɓi tayin ku don shiga Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Bude matsayi
jobs.description: Nemo damar ka ta gaba kuma ka shiga cikin ƙungiyarmu mai girma
jobs.unavailable: Ba a karɓi aikace-aikacen ba a wannan lokacin.
jobs.noMatch: Ba ku ga aikin da ya dace ba?

listings.title: Babban Injiniya na Full-Stack
listings.description: Ƙirƙirar aikace-aikacen kasuwanci masu haɓakawa ta amfani da React, Node.js, da fasahar girgije.

listings.title: Injiniyan DevOps
listings.description: Tsara da kula da bututun CI / CD, ababen more rayuwa azaman lambar, da tsarin saka idanu.

listings.title: Injiniyan AI / ML
listings.description: Samar da samfuran koyon inji da mafita na AI don abokan cinikin kamfanoni.

listings.title: Mai tsara samfur
listings.description: Ƙirƙirar kyawawan ƙwarewar mai amfani don hadaddun aikace-aikacen kasuwanci.

listings.title: Solutions Architect
listings.description: Tsara hanyoyin fasaha na ƙarshe zuwa ƙarshe kuma jagorantar abokan ciniki ta hanyar canjin dijital.

listings.title: Marubuci na fasaha
listings.description: Ƙirƙirar cikakkun takardu, koyawa, da abun ciki na fasaha.

cta.title: Tambayoyi game da aiki a nan?
cta.description: Za mu so mu ji daga gare ku. Tuntuɓi mu kuma za mu amsa duk wata tambaya game da rayuwa a Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Bincika yadda muka taimaka wa kamfanoni a duk faɗin masana'antu don canza ayyuka ta hanyar fasahar da ta dace.

items.title: Hijira na girgije da zamani
items.description: Ƙaura tsarin banki na gado zuwa kayan aikin girgije na AWS ba tare da lokacin hutu ba.
items.challenge: Legacy monolithic architecture causing scalability issues
items.result: Samun nasarar canja wurin microservices akan AWS

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Gina samfuran ML don nazarin hoto na likita tare da daidaito na 95% +.
items.challenge: Hanyoyin bincike na hannu suna ɗaukar lokaci mai tsawo
items.result: Binciken atomatik tare da AI / ML

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Ci gaba da dandamali na BI yana sarrafa abubuwan 10M + a kowace rana.
items.challenge: Babu hangen nesa na ainihi a cikin mahimman ma'aunin kasuwanci

cta.title: Shirye don rubuta labarin nasarar ku?
cta.description: Bari mu tattauna yadda za mu iya taimaka muku cimma irin wannan sakamako da haɓaka tare da amincewa.

filters.title: Masana'antu Filter
filters.empty: Babu wani binciken shari'ar da ya dace da matatar masana'antu da aka zaɓa.

hero.description: Koyarwar fasaha, fahimtar masana'antu, da darussa masu amfani daga aikin isar da kayayyaki na ainihi.

featuredPost.title: Cikakkiyar hanyar zuwa Labari: Ni daga mac » apple » Noticias » Abubuwan da za a lura da su a cikin 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Bincika sabbin abubuwan da ke faruwa a cikin ci gaban girgije, daga gine-ginen da ba su da uwar garke zuwa ƙididdigar gefe.

posts.title: Gina Microservices masu haɓaka tare da Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Jagora mai amfani don gine-gine da tura microservices ta amfani da AKS.

posts.title: Koyon na'ura a cikin samarwa: Darussan da aka koya
posts.excerpt: Darussan da aka gwada daga tura samfuran ML a sikelin.

posts.title: Amsa ta 19: Menene sabo da kuma dalilin da ya sa yake da muhimmanci
posts.excerpt: Yi la'akari da zurfin React 19 da tasirin aiki.

newsletter.title: Biyan kuɗi zuwa Newsletter ɗinmu
newsletter.description: Samu sabbin labarai, koyawa, da ra'ayoyin da aka bayar a kowane mako.
newsletter.note: Babu spam. Cire rajista a kowane lokaci.

hero.description: Bayanin filin da alamu masu amfani daga ƙungiyoyin da ke gina samfuran AI, tsarin kasuwanci, da amintaccen dandamali na girgije.

faqs.question: Waɗanne ayyuka ne Horizon Tech ke bayarwa?
faqs.answer: Muna ba da ci gaban software na al'ada, mafita na AI / ML, gine-ginen girgije, DevOps, hankali na kasuwanci, da sabis na IoT.

faqs.question: Ta yaya zan fara aiki tare da Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Tuntube mu ta hanyar fom ko imel tare da buƙatunku. Za mu tsara kiran ganowa kuma mu raba shawara.

faqs.question: Shin kuna ba da tallafi da kulawa na yau da kullun?
faqs.answer: Haka ne. Muna ba da tallafi da fakitin kulawa wanda ya haɗa da gyaran kwari, sabuntawar tsaro, da haɓaka fasali.

education.title: Albarkatun fasaha
education.subtitle: Jagorori, koyawa, da mafi kyawun ayyuka daga ƙungiyar Horizon Tech

hub.title: Cibiyar Ilmantarwa
hub.description: Bincika albarkatun fasaha da aka tsara a duk faɗin girgije, AI / ML, DevOps, da ci gaban software na zamani.
hub.note: Waɗannan kayan aikin sun dogara ne akan ƙwarewar aikin na ainihi kuma an sabunta su akai-akai.

training.text: Shin kuna buƙatar horo na hannu? Muna ba da bita na al'ada akan gine-ginen girgije, DevOps, da ayyukan isar da kayayyaki na zamani.
